title: Flume-Scale methane-driven nitratereduction - metabarcoding and qPCR results
author: Pfaff, Felix
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw data for qPCR and 16S rRNA gene metabarcoding analysis. 
 Fasta files can be found here: PRJNA1473681 -> metadata and identifier file as .txt files here 
 Raw outputs of Tax-Table and beta ordination matrix as qzv and qza files from Qiime2
